FFlagMeshContentPropertyItemFix.mechanism: Fixes issues with how mesh content properties are handled in the game engine.
FFlagMeshContentPropertyItemFix.purpose: Ensures that 3D models display correctly, enhancing visual quality for players.

DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many activities can be tracked in the Android app lifecycle.
DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.purpose: Prevents crashes and improves stability of the Roblox app on Android devices.

FFlagInstancePickerFixBlankSpaceClick.mechanism: Fixes a bug that allows clicking on empty spaces in the instance picker.
FFlagInstancePickerFixBlankSpaceClick.purpose: Enhances usability by ensuring that clicks only select valid items, making it easier to navigate.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves load times and version tracking, ensuring players have the latest updates quickly.

DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.mechanism: Sets the maximum number of activity lifecycle states stored for Android apps.
DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.purpose: Improves app stability by managing how many past states are remembered, leading to smoother performance.

FIntRenderBufferTypeIndex_Staged.mechanism: Defines the type of rendering buffer used for graphics processing.
FIntRenderBufferTypeIndex_Staged.purpose: Enhances visual quality and performance in games by optimizing how graphics are rendered.

FFlagColliderHeight.mechanism: Adjusts the height of colliders in the game physics engine.
FFlagColliderHeight.purpose: Improves collision detection accuracy, making interactions in games feel more realistic.

FFlagInputEventsRaceUseRuntimeMutex_Stag.mechanism: Implements a mutex to manage input events more effectively during gameplay.
FFlagInputEventsRaceUseRuntimeMutex_Stag.purpose: Reduces input lag and improves responsiveness, making controls feel more fluid for players.

FFlagIAPViewportSupportAccessory_Staged.mechanism: Enables support for in-app purchases to be displayed correctly in the game viewport.
FFlagIAPViewportSupportAccessory_Staged.purpose: Enhances the user experience by ensuring that purchase options are clearly visible and accessible.

DFFlagNIIStricterPrefilter_Staged.mechanism: Implements a more rigorous filtering system for user-generated content.
DFFlagNIIStricterPrefilter_Staged.purpose: Improves the safety and quality of content players can access.

DFIntRbxTelemetryStartupEventThrottleHun.mechanism: Limits the frequency of telemetry data collection during startup.
DFIntRbxTelemetryStartupEventThrottleHun.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing initial load times.

FFlagLuaAppEnableHeroUnitV2.mechanism: Activates an updated version of the Hero Unit feature in Lua applications.
FFlagLuaAppEnableHeroUnitV2.purpose: Provides developers with improved tools for creating engaging experiences.

FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP.mechanism: Corrects issues with warning messages related to in-app purchases based on locale.
FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP.purpose: Ensures players receive accurate information about purchases in their language.

FFlagLuaAppEdpSingleColumnAcrossPlatform.mechanism: Standardizes the layout of the EDP (Experience Design Platform) to a single column on all devices.
FFlagLuaAppEdpSingleColumnAcrossPlatform.purpose: Creates a consistent user interface for players, regardless of the platform they use.

DFStringInternalTestGroupIds.mechanism: Stores identifiers for internal testing groups.
DFStringInternalTestGroupIds.purpose: Helps developers manage and test features with specific player groups.

DFIntSlimTeamCreateUploadCap.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of uploads for team-created games.
DFIntSlimTeamCreateUploadCap.purpose: Ensures teams can manage their game uploads effectively without exceeding limits.

DFFlagGetHlsLodManifest2.mechanism: Fetches a new version of the manifest for streaming assets.
DFFlagGetHlsLodManifest2.purpose: Improves the loading of game assets for a smoother gameplay experience.

FFlagAddFriendsBannersRefactor_Staged.mechanism: Updates how friend notifications are displayed.
FFlagAddFriendsBannersRefactor_Staged.purpose: Enhances the visibility of friend activities, making it easier to connect with friends.

FFlagRemoveRefToMissingLocInConnection.mechanism: Eliminates references to non-existent locations in network connections.
FFlagRemoveRefToMissingLocInConnection.purpose: Reduces errors and improves game stability by ensuring connections are valid.

FFlagMemoryPrioritizationRaceConditionBu.mechanism: Fixes a bug that caused memory prioritization issues during concurrent processes.
FFlagMemoryPrioritizationRaceConditionBu.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing crashes and lag when multiple tasks run at the same time.

DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of players that can join a game on 64-bit Windows systems.
DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.purpose: Ensures a smoother experience by preventing server overloads, allowing for better gameplay for everyone.
